case_title: CINTAS CORPORATION VS. LORI'S DINER INTERNATIONAL, INC., ET AL

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LORI'S DINER INTERNATIONAL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL THREE CLAIMS. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED.

MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-27-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CINTAS CORPORATION'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ORDER SUSTAINING ORDER IS CONTINUED FROM OCT-27-2016 TO DEC-05-2016, AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPT. 302, ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND PUT THE MATTER OVER FOR A FURTHER HEARING DATE FOR COUNSEL TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL MOVING PAPERS AND OPPOSING COUNSEL TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION PAPERS. COUNSEL MUST ALSO PUT IN HIS SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION PAPERS THE EXACT DOLLAR AMOUNT THAT HE IS SEEKING FOR COSTS AND FEES AS A RESULT OF THE TIME AND EXPENSE INCURRED, IF THE COURT DOES ULTIMATELY GRANT THE 473B MANDATORY RELIEF PROVISION. SUPPLEMENTAL MOVING PAPERS ARE TO BE FILED BY NOVEMBER 15, 2016. SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION PAPERS ARE TO BE FILED BY NOVEMBER 28, 2016. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion Of Plaintiffs Motion To Set Aside Order Sustaining Order
Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PLAINTIFF CINTAS CORPORATION'S Motion To Set Aside Order Sustaining Order is taken off calendar. The case was dismissed on November 22, 2016.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion Of Plaintiffs Motion To Set Aside Order Sustaining Order
Off Calendar Oct-27-2016 Continued To Dec-05-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Booska of Law Offices of Seven A. Booska telephone number 415-397-4345 for Plaintiff Cintas Corporation.
Attorney John Wiley telephone number 415-831-0500 for Defendant Lori's Diner International, Inc.

The Parties presented oral argument and discussed Younessi v. Woolf. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court on its own motion raises the issue of whether it should change the demurrer order to sustained with leave to amend. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and put the matter over for a further hearing date for Mr. Booska to file supplemental moving papers and for Mr. Wiley to file supplemental opposition papers. Mr. Wiley will also put in his supplemental opposition papers the exact dollar amount that he is seeking for costs and fees as a result of the time and expense incurred, if the Court does ultimately grant the 473B mandatory relief provision. Supplemental moving papers are to be filed by November 15, 2016. Supplemental opposition papers are to be filed by November 28, 2016. Plaintiff Cintas Corporation's Motion To Set Aside Order Sustaining is continued to December 5, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2016 Continued To Oct-19-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2016 Continued To Aug-17-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Wiley of Law Office of John Wiley telephone number 415-831-0500 for Defendant Lori's Diner International, Inc.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LORI'S DINER INTERNATIONAL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to all three claims. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
